title: Iron Chests
body: Iron Chests for Fabric is a simple mod that enhances your Minecraft Gameplay by adding new, upgradable chests, that will allow you to store more items in a single block. Each Chest can be upgraded, starting from the Wooden Chest (Vanilla Minecraft). By doing so you will just need to craft a Chest Upgrade, and SHIFT + RIGHT_CLICK the chest you want to upgrade. This will avoid the need to break the already placed chest. Do not worry, the chest will keep its inventory. ## Mod Requirements [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) ## Chest Upgrades Christmas: 27 Slots Copper: 45 Slots Iron: 54 Slots Gold: 81 Slots Emerald: 108 Slots Diamond: 108 Slots Crystal: 108 Slots Obsidian: 108 Slots
